[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010011 4
1 0110100 3
2 0000000 a
3 1001001 3
4 1000011 3
5 1111110 6
6 1000000 1
7 1010000 2

12 21 0100011 3
23 32 1100111 5
34 43 0110100 3 match 1

56 65 0001010 2
67 76 0111101 5
70 07 0111000 3

13 31 1000100 2
24 42 1010011 4 match 0
